jp.title: 山崎賢人＆吉沢亮の8年にわたる成長 『キングダム』佐藤信介監督が明かす
jp.description: 原泰久の人気漫画を実写映画化したシリーズの第5弾『キングダム　魂の決戦』（7月17日公開）の佐藤信介監督が、主人公の秦国の武将・信と、国王のエイ政（※エイ政のエイは、上に亡、中に口、下左から月、女、迅のつくりが正式表記）を演じた山崎賢人（※「崎」は「たつさき」）と吉沢亮について語った。

world.title: Messi eyes glorious farewell as Spain, Argentina clash in World Cup final
world.description: Spanish elan meets Argentinian steel in a historic World Cup final on Sunday which sees the reigning champions of Europe and South America battle for football's ultimate prize.

world.title: Lewis Hamilton and Kim Kardashian Went on a Lake Trip
world.description: The couple posted photos Jet-Skiing, hiking, and hanging with Kardashian’s kids Psalm and Chicago. The F1 driver also featured photos of his niece and nephew, Willow and Kaiden.

world.title: Aston Villa transfers: Johan Manzambi signs in club record deal
world.description: Unai Emery makes his first summer signing by bringing in Johan Manzambi for a club record fee of just over £50m.

world.title: Lenovo Announces World’s First Laptop With Inkjet-Printed OLED
world.description: Inkjet-printed OLED debuts in the Lenovo Legion R9000P, cutting manufacturing waste - with affordable 27-inch monitors targeting mass production by 2026.

world.title: Brenda Fricker, Oscar-winning 'pigeon lady' of 'Home Alone 2,' dead at 81
world.description: Oscar-winning Irish actress Brenda Fricker, known as the pigeon lady in "Home Alone 2" and her role in "My Left Foot" with Daniel Day-Lewis, has died at 81 in Dublin.

world.title: AI-designed proteins help scientists see inside living cells
world.description: Cells are like metropolises, home to millions of molecular residents. If one were to stand atop a high-rise, trying to identify most of its inhabitants would seem an impossible task. Even with the sophisticated imaging tools currently available to scientists, it is challenging to zoom in on specific molecules and view them with a high degree of detail.

world.title: Microbiota dysbiosis triggers intestinal cancer stemness
world.description: Scientists at National Taiwan University College of Medicine have discovered that cancer formation is not simply caused by gene mutations. Colorectal cancers primarily originate from epithelial cells that form adenocarcinomas at the interface between the host and microbiota. In addition to genetic mutations, the trillions of microbes in the gut environment, termed microbiota or microbiome, play important roles in cancer development. The microbiome is now regarded as a promising therapeutic target, in addition to controlling host factors, for managing colon cancer.

world.title: Ariana Grande, Ty Dolla $ign Sing 'Safety Net' at Her Show
world.description: Ariana Grande brought out Ty Dolla $ign to sing "Safety Net" on night three of the Eternal Sunshine Tour shows in Brooklyn.

world.title: Ventiva touts fanless cooler for 15% data center energy efficiency gains
world.description: The company says its ionic air mover improves performance of back-of-rack server components while fewer front-of-rack bulk fans means reduced energy costs.
